summary.key_theme: 受惠於生成式 AI 應用落地與市場對軟體股的估值修正，ServiceNow 近期股價強勁反彈，儘管面臨短期獲利回吐壓力。

bullish.title: Why ServiceNow Stock Skyrocketed 41% in May
bullish.reason: 市場重新評估 ServiceNow 在企業 AI 領域的成長潛力，修正了先前過度悲觀的估值，推動股價單月大幅上漲。

bullish.title: Why Is NOW Stock Surging In Premarket? — Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said agentic AI will create opportunities for the company’s software partners, including ServiceNow
bullish.reason: Nvidia 執行長黃仁勳公開點名 ServiceNow 為代理式 AI (Agentic AI) 的關鍵合作夥伴，顯著提升市場對其技術護城河的信心。

bullish.title: Oppenheimer Cites Healthy Overal Demand, Reiterates “Outperform” Rating On ServiceNow (NOW)
bullish.reason: Oppenheimer 維持「優於大盤」評級，強調企業對其軟體需求強勁，且該公司在避險基金持倉中名列前茅，具備機構投資人支撐。

bullish.title: ServiceNow Deepens Everbridge xMatters AI Ties In Critical Workflows
bullish.reason: 透過與 Everbridge 的深度整合，強化了 AI 驅動的數位營運工作流程，有助於提升產品競爭力與客戶黏著度。

bullish.title: City Year Receives $2.5M Grant from ServiceNow to Power Student Success and Build Future-Ready Talent Pipelines
bullish.reason: 投入 250 萬美元支持教育與人才培育，展現企業營運創新能力與品牌正面形象。

bearish.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Stock Declines While Market Improves: Some Information for Investors
bearish.reason: 股價單日下跌 6.04 %，反映在經歷連續漲勢後，市場出現獲利了結賣壓。

bearish.title: ServiceNow and Snowflake Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
bearish.reason: 軟體板塊整體回調，導致 ServiceNow 與 Snowflake 等同類股同步走弱，顯示短期板塊輪動壓力。

bearish.title: Are ServiceNow’s (NOW) Rejected Governance Changes Overshadowing Its Expanding AI Partnership Narrative?
bearish.reason: 股東否決了治理改革提案，雖未直接影響營運，但引發市場對公司治理透明度的關注。

neutral.title: ServiceNow vs Palantir: Which Enterprise AI Stock Belongs in a Retirement Portfolio?
neutral.reason: 針對 ServiceNow 與 Palantir 的投資組合比較分析，提供投資人策略建議，無實質營運利多或利空。

neutral.title: ServiceNow vs. Intuit: Which Technology Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
neutral.reason: 兩家科技巨頭的財務與估值對比分析，屬於中性的投資參考資訊。

neutral.title: Is It Time To Reassess ServiceNow (NOW) After Recent Share Price Surge?
neutral.reason: 探討股價急漲後的重新評估需求，屬於投資人觀點分析，不構成實質消息面影響。
